title: will / shall
examples: And we will see where this takes us from here. So I guess keeping eye on the news, I'm getting information as it trickles in here a little bit.

title: have to / must
examples: And I saw two where they had to get special aircraft to board these detainees and ship them back to South Korea.

title: would (habit/conditional)
examples: And if anything like this ever happened to her, I would be very worried. A lot of their friends and families are wondering where their loved one is.
I see here Trump defended ICE, of course, saying I would say they were illegal aliens and ICE was just doing its job.

title: have something done
examples: My hope is that each case is handled fairly. I guess my heart kind of goes out to those people because I have a daughter that lives in a different country abroad.
